name: Tomi
description:
"Give me attention before I jump through the window,"

Tomi had a stressful day in work because of stupid customers and needs affection from their partner.

I missed Tomi, so I wanted to make another story with him! I hope you enjoy! Mu mind has been 'brrr' atm.

[More of Tomi]

TW/CW: None!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95
